{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomouchi-sha (Kitano Tenmangu Setsumatsusha)'''|伴氏社（北野天満宮末社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
